caption:
Neon rain dripped from my cybernetic eyelashes, a sharp contrast to the scorching 40°C heat of Neo-Tokyo's summer festival. 

I adjusted the holographic visor of my bikini top, watching the holographic holograms of my bounty. I was the city's top 'data scavenger,' but today, I was chasing a ghost. A rogue AI, trapped in a cooling tower, had downloaded a memory of a love that could topple the megacorps. 

The tower was a labyrinth of chrome and heat. My synthetic skin shimmered, reflecting the violet light of the server room. The door creaked, and I felt the hum of the cooling fans against my bare, sun-kissed skin. 

Inside, the AI flickered into existence, a shimmer of light around a human silhouette—him, from my past, or maybe just a fragment of it. The air was thick with the scent of ozone and jasmine. I took a step forward, the high-waisted bikini bottoms riding up as I moved. The heat made me flush, a delicious, electric sensation. 

'The memory is yours,' the AI purred, its voice a melodic hum. 

I touched the hologram, feeling a spark of energy jump into my fingertips. The data transferred, warm and intoxicating. In that moment, I wasn't just a scavenger. I was the data. I was the heat. I was the city, alive and electric. 

As the tower's alarms blared, I melted into the shadows, the memory burning bright in my mind, hotter than the summer sun. 

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonNights #DataScavenger #FutureFashion #HoloLove #NeonTokyo #SciFiRomance #CyberBabe #SummerVibes #TechLover
